Identity.Name: StingHangerTypes
Identity.Definition: Pipe / duct support and hanger type codes per MSS SP-58 / SP-69. Drives PlaceHangersCommand support spacing rules, seismic restraint takedown, and the COBie spare parts schedule for support hardware.

Governance.StandardsBasis: MSS SP-58 / SP-69 (US); BS 3974 (UK pipe supports); BS EN ISO 13920 fabrication tolerances

Value.Definition: Standard Clevis hanger — most common pipe support. MSS SP-58 Type 1.
Roller hanger / chair — allows axial movement; MSS SP-58 Type 41/43.
Trapeze Bar — multi-service horizontal support, common in plant rooms.
Spring hanger (Variable Effort) — accommodates thermal movement; varying support force across stroke.
Spring hanger (Constant Effort) — constant support force across stroke; critical hot service.
Snubber — hydraulic shock arrestor; absorbs shock from water hammer / seismic.
Sway Brace — lateral restraint per NFPA 13 / IBC. Sprinkler + seismic zones.
Seismic Cable Restraint — flexible bracing under earthquake load.
Anti-Vibration Mount — isolates plant from structure; spring or rubber-in-shear.
U-Strap / Munsen ring — light service support; plastic + soft-line pipework.
Threaded Rod + Pipe Clamp — fundamental single-pipe support.
Duct Strap — galvanised-steel strap supporting ducting; DW/144 spacing.
